attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY ,
NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ,
NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
-999 AS   BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,      
CASE WHEN COALESCE(NEMT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)>0 THEN 'Engine' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS   ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD,  -- CONFIRM : FOR DEFAULT RECORDS, ITS 'UNKNOWN'
NEMT.END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT  as  END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT,  
'MANUAL' AS  ENRICHMENT_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD,   
COALESCE(NEMT.FIELD_VALIDATED_CUST_PARTY_KEY  ,-999) AS   FIELD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PRTY_KEY, 
'UNKNOWN'   AS   HQ_REMOTE_CD,                 
'UNKNOWN'   AS   LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME,     
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP (0)  AS LAST_UPDATED_DTM,  -- CONFIRM : FOR DEFAULT RECORDS ITS CAST('1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))         
CASE WHEN COALESCE(NEMT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)>0 THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE NULL END  AS   NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME,  -- CONFIRM : FOR DEFAULT RECORDS ITS NULL (KEEP AS UNKNOWN FOR ALL DATA)
'='    AS   OWNED_FLG,                     
COALESCE(NEMT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY      ,-999) AS   SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY, 
-999  AS  SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTENSION_ID_INT, 
-999 AS  SLS_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PARTY_KEY, 
'UNKNOWN'  AS   VALIDATION_MODE_CD,            
'UNKNOWN'   AS   VALIDATION_STATUS_CD  ,
CASE WHEN COALESCE(NEMT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)>0 THEN CAST('GEO_ACCOUNT' AS VARCHAR(20)) ELSE CAST('UNK' AS VARCHAR(20)) END  AS ENRCHMT_ACCT_TYPE 
FROM 
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM 
LEFT JOIN ($$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE NSAL
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_GEO_ACCT_ENRHMT_RBK_MNL_TRX NEMT
ON NEMT.MANUAL_TRX_KEY=NSAL.MANUAL_TRX_KEY and NSAL.MANUAL_TRX_KEY <>-999
AND COALESCE(NEMT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)>0
)
ON NBM.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT = NSAL.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT
AND NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY   =NSAL.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT
WHERE NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('POS_ADJ','SLS_ADJ') 
AND NBM.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME> '$$LastExtractDate'
AND NOT EXISTS (
SELECT 1 FROM  ( SELECT NSAL1.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT,NSAL1.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE NSAL1
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_VLDTD_END_CST_RBK_MNL_TRX_TV NEMT1
ON NEMT1.MANUAL_TRX_KEY=NSAL1.MANUAL_TRX_KEY and NSAL1.MANUAL_TRX_KEY <>-999
AND NEMT1.ENRCHMNT_SLS_ACCT_PRTY_TYP_CD = 'NAMED_ACCOUNT'
AND COALESCE(NEMT1.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)>0
AND NEMT1.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00')NSAL11
WHERE NBM.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT = NSAL11.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT
AND NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY   =NSAL11.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT)

SELECT
NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY ,
NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ,
NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
-999 AS   BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,  
CASE WHEN COALESCE(NEMT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)>0 THEN 'Engine' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS   ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD,  -- CONFIRM : FOR DEFAULT RECORDS, ITS 'UNKNOWN'
CASE WHEN COALESCE(NEMT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)>0 THEN 100 ELSE NULL END AS END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT,  
'MANUAL' AS  ENRICHMENT_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD,   
COALESCE(NEMT.FIELD_VALIDATED_CUST_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS   FIELD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PRTY_KEY, 
'UNKNOWN'   AS   HQ_REMOTE_CD,                 
'UNKNOWN'   AS   LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME,     
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP (0) AS LAST_UPDATED_DTM,  
CASE WHEN COALESCE(NEMT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)>0 THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE NULL END  AS   NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME,  -- CONFIRM : FOR DEFAULT RECORDS ITS NULL 
'='    AS   OWNED_FLG,                     
COALESCE(NEMT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS   SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY, 
-999  AS  SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTENSION_ID_INT, 
-999 AS  SLS_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PARTY_KEY, 
'UNKNOWN'  AS   VALIDATION_MODE_CD,            
'UNKNOWN'   AS   VALIDATION_STATUS_CD        ,  
CASE WHEN COALESCE(NEMT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)>0 THEN CAST('GEO_ACCOUNT' AS VARCHAR(20)) ELSE CAST('UNK' AS VARCHAR(20)) END  AS ENRCHMT_ACCT_TYPE 
FROM 
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM 
LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_GEO_ACCT_ENRICHMENT_SO_LINE NEMT
ON NBM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NEMT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND COALESCE(NEMT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)>0
WHERE NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('ERP','AR')
AND NBM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY>0    
AND NBM.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME> '$$LastExtractDate'
AND NOT EXISTS (
SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_VLDTD_END_CUST_FOR_SO_LN_TV NESL
WHERE NBM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NESL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND NESL.ENRCHMNT_SLS_ACCT_PRTY_TYP_CD = 'NAMED_ACCOUNT'
AND COALESCE(NESL.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)>0
AND NESL.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00')

SELECT
NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY ,
NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ,
NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
-999 AS   BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,  
CASE WHEN COALESCE(NEMT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)>0 THEN 'Engine' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS   ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD,  -- CONFIRM : FOR DEFAULT RECORDS, ITS 'UNKNOWN' 
CASE WHEN COALESCE(NEMT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)>0 THEN 100 ELSE NULL END AS END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT,  
'MANUAL' AS  ENRICHMENT_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD,   
COALESCE(NEMT.FIELD_VALIDATED_CUST_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS   FIELD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PRTY_KEY, 
'UNKNOWN'   AS   HQ_REMOTE_CD,                 
'UNKNOWN'   AS   LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME,     
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP (0)  AS LAST_UPDATED_DTM,             
CASE WHEN COALESCE(NEMT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)>0 THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE NULL END  AS   NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME,  -- CONFIRM : FOR DEFAULT RECORDS ITS NULL
'='    AS   OWNED_FLG,                     
COALESCE(NEMT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS   SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY, 
-999  AS  SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTENSION_ID_INT, 
-999 AS  SLS_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PARTY_KEY, 
'UNKNOWN'  AS   VALIDATION_MODE_CD,            
'UNKNOWN'   AS   VALIDATION_STATUS_CD ,  
CASE WHEN COALESCE(NEMT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)>0 THEN CAST('GEO_ACCOUNT' AS VARCHAR(20)) ELSE CAST('UNK' AS VARCHAR(20)) END  AS ENRCHMT_ACCT_TYPE 
FROM 
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM 
LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_GEO_ACCT_ENRCHMNT_POS_TRX_LN NEMT
ON NBM. BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = NEMT.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
AND COALESCE(NEMT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)>0
WHERE NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ='POS'  AND NBM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT>0  /*ADDED THIS CONDITION BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT>0*/
AND NBM.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME> '$$LastExtractDate'
AND NOT EXISTS (
SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_VLDTD_END_CUST_POS_TRX_LN_TV NEPT
WHERE NBM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = NEPT.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
AND NEPT.ENRCHMNT_SLS_ACCT_PRTY_TYP_CD = 'NAMED_ACCOUNT'
AND NBM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT>0 
AND COALESCE(NEPT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)>0
AND NEPT.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00')

SELECT
NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY ,
NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ,
NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
-999 AS   BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,        
CASE WHEN COALESCE(NEMT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)>0 THEN 'Engine' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS   ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD,  -- CONFIRM : FOR DEFAULT RECORDS, ITS 'UNKNOWN'  
CASE WHEN COALESCE(NEMT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)>0 THEN 100 ELSE NULL END AS END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT,   
'MANUAL' AS  ENRICHMENT_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD,   
COALESCE(NEMT.FIELD_VALIDATED_CUST_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS   FIELD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PRTY_KEY, 
'UNKNOWN'   AS   HQ_REMOTE_CD,                 
'UNKNOWN'   AS   LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME,     
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP (0)  AS LAST_UPDATED_DTM,            
CASE WHEN COALESCE(NEMT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)>0 THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE NULL END  AS   NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME,  -- CONFIRM : FOR DEFAULT RECORDS ITS NULL  
'='    AS   OWNED_FLG,                     
COALESCE(NEMT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS   SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY, 
-999  AS  SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTENSION_ID_INT, 
-999 AS  SLS_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PARTY_KEY, 
'UNKNOWN'  AS   VALIDATION_MODE_CD,            
'UNKNOWN'   AS   VALIDATION_STATUS_CD ,  
CASE WHEN COALESCE(NEMT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)>0 THEN CAST('GEO_ACCOUNT' AS VARCHAR(20)) ELSE CAST('UNK' AS VARCHAR(20)) END  AS ENRCHMT_ACCT_TYPE 
FROM 
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM 
LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_GEO_ACCT_ENRCHMNT_NAPPLD_TRX NEMT
ON NBM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NEMT.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  
AND COALESCE(NEMT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)>0 
WHERE NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ='AR'
AND NBM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY < 0
AND NBM.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME> '$$LastExtractDate'
AND NOT EXISTS (
SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_VLDTD_END_CUST_NAPLD_TRX_TV NEAR
WHERE NBM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NEAR.AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY
AND NEAR.ENRCHMNT_SLS_ACCT_PRTY_TYP_CD = 'NAMED_ACCOUNT'
AND COALESCE(NEAR.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)>0
AND NEAR.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00'   )

SELECT
NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY ,
NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ,
NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
-999 AS   BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,      
CASE WHEN COALESCE(NEMT.SALES_ACCT_GROUP_PTY_KEY,-999)>0 THEN 'Engine' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS   ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD,  -- CONFIRM : FOR DEFAULT RECORDS, ITS 'UNKNOWN'
NEMT.END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT  as  END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT,  
'MANUAL' AS  ENRICHMENT_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD,   
COALESCE(NEMT.FIELD_VALIDATED_CUST_PTY_KEY  ,-999) AS   FIELD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PRTY_KEY, 
'UNKNOWN'   AS   HQ_REMOTE_CD,                 
'UNKNOWN'   AS   LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME,     
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP (0)  AS LAST_UPDATED_DTM,           
CASE WHEN COALESCE(NEMT.SALES_ACCT_GROUP_PTY_KEY,-999)>0 THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE NULL END  AS   NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME,  -- CONFIRM : FOR DEFAULT RECORDS ITS NULL  
'='    AS   OWNED_FLG,                     
COALESCE(NEMT.SALES_ACCT_GROUP_PTY_KEY      ,-999) AS   SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY, 
-999  AS  SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTENSION_ID_INT, 
-999 AS  SLS_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PARTY_KEY, 
'UNKNOWN'  AS   VALIDATION_MODE_CD,            
'UNKNOWN'   AS   VALIDATION_STATUS_CD  ,
CASE WHEN COALESCE(NEMT.SALES_ACCT_GROUP_PTY_KEY,-999)>0 THEN CAST('GEO_ACCOUNT' AS VARCHAR(20)) ELSE CAST('UNK' AS VARCHAR(20)) END  AS ENRCHMT_ACCT_TYPE 
FROM 
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM 
LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_GEO_ACCT_ES_ITM_SLS_TRX NEMT
ON NBM.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY = NEMT.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
AND COALESCE(NEMT.SALES_ACCT_GROUP_PTY_KEY,-999)>0
WHERE NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('XAAS')  
AND NBM.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME> '$$LastExtractDate'
AND NBM.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY >0  
AND NOT EXISTS (
SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_FLVDT_ENDCST_SS_ITMSLSTRX_TV NESL
WHERE NBM.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY = NESL.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
AND NESL.ENRCHMT_SLS_ACCT_PTY_TYPE_CD = 'NAMED_ACCOUNT'
AND COALESCE(NESL.SALES_ACCT_GROUP_PTY_KEY,-999)>0
AND NESL.END_TV_DT ='3500-01-01'   )
